Mission-driven orchestration for Claude and Codex with locked specs, structured reviews, and real repository state checks.

API Reference#

Module Summary#

audax_core.app

CLI entrypoints for launching the Audax review loop.

audax_core.orchestrator

Mission-loop orchestration for spec drafting, implementation, and review.

audax_core.backends

Adapters for the external Claude and Codex command-line interfaces.

audax_core.progress

Progress reporting and safe subprocess execution helpers.

audax_core.artifacts

Mission artifact creation, locking, and lightweight PDF rendering.

audax_core.repo_rules

Discovery of repository policy files used to ground the mission loop.

audax_core.prompts

Prompt builders for spec drafting, implementation, and review rounds.

audax_core.reviews

Schemas and parsing helpers for Codex review payloads.

audax_core.models

Shared data models, defaults, and backend protocols for Audax.

audax_core.approval

Interactive mission approval helpers.

CLI And Orchestration#

CLI entrypoints for launching the Audax review loop.

audax_core.app.ensure_cli_available(cmd)[source]

Raise an error when a required external CLI is not available.

Parameters:

cmd (str)

Return type:

None

audax_core.app.parse_args(argv=None)[source]

Parse command-line arguments for the top-level audax.py launcher.

Parameters:

argv (list[str] | None)

Return type:

Namespace

audax_core.app.read_task(args)[source]

Resolve the mission request from positional arguments or stdin.

Parameters:

args (Namespace)

Return type:

str

audax_core.app.main(argv=None)[source]

Run the Audax CLI and return a process exit status.

Parameters:

argv (list[str] | None)

Return type:

int

Mission-loop orchestration for spec drafting, implementation, and review.

class audax_core.orchestrator.ReviewLoopOrchestrator(config, artifacts, claude, codex, *, approval_gate=None, output_stream=sys.stdout)[source]

Coordinate the end-to-end Claude and Codex mission loop.

Parameters:

  • config (LoopConfig)

  • artifacts (MissionArtifacts)

  • claude (ClaudeBackend)

  • codex (CodexBackend)

  • approval_gate (Callable[[str, Path], ApprovalDecision] | None)

  • output_stream (TextIO)

run(task)[source]

Execute the full mission lifecycle and persist a run report.

Parameters:

task (str)

Return type:

RunSummary

Backends And Process Control#

Adapters for the external Claude and Codex command-line interfaces.

audax_core.backends.parse_claude_stream_output(output)[source]

Extract the assistant text from Claude’s stream-json output.

Parameters:

output (str)

Return type:

str

class audax_core.backends.ClaudeCLI(cmd, process_runner, repo_root)[source]

Thin wrapper around the Claude CLI prompt interface.

Parameters:

  • cmd (str)

  • process_runner (QuietProcessRunner)

  • repo_root (Path)

run(prompt, label)[source]

Execute Claude with a plain-text prompt and return its rendered text.

Parameters:

  • prompt (str)

  • label (str)

Return type:

str

class audax_core.backends.CodexCLI(cmd, process_runner, repo_root)[source]

Thin wrapper around the Codex structured-output CLI interface.

Parameters:

  • cmd (str)

  • process_runner (QuietProcessRunner)

  • repo_root (Path)

run_json(prompt, label, schema)[source]

Execute Codex with a JSON schema and return the parsed object.

Parameters:

  • prompt (str)

  • label (str)

  • schema (dict[str, Any])

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

Progress reporting and safe subprocess execution helpers.

class audax_core.progress.HeartbeatProgress(label, interval_seconds=DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_SECONDS, stream=sys.stdout, clock=time.monotonic)[source]

Print sparse progress updates without streaming raw agent output.

Parameters:

  • label (str)

  • interval_seconds (float)

  • stream (TextIO)

  • clock (Callable[[], float])

class audax_core.progress.QuietProcessRunner(heartbeat_seconds=DEFAULT_HEARTBEAT_SECONDS, progress_stream=sys.stdout, subprocess_timeout_seconds=None)[source]

Run a subprocess quietly while printing heartbeat status lines.

Parameters:

  • heartbeat_seconds (float)

  • progress_stream (TextIO)

  • subprocess_timeout_seconds (float | None)

run(cmd, label, *, cwd, stdin_text=None)[source]

Run a command, capture combined output, and enforce an optional timeout.

Parameters:

  • cmd (list[str])

  • label (str)

  • cwd (Path)

  • stdin_text (str | None)

Return type:

str

Artifacts, Prompts, And Review Helpers#

Mission artifact creation, locking, and lightweight PDF rendering.

audax_core.artifacts.sha256_file(path)[source]

Return the SHA-256 digest for a file on disk.

Parameters:

path (Path)

Return type:

str

audax_core.artifacts.lock_mission_spec(markdown_text, artifacts, task)[source]

Write and lock the immutable mission-spec artifacts for a run.

Parameters:

  • markdown_text (str)

  • artifacts (MissionArtifacts)

  • task (str)

Return type:

LockedMissionSpec

audax_core.artifacts.assert_mission_spec_locked(artifacts)[source]

Verify that the locked markdown and PDF artifacts are unchanged.

Parameters:

artifacts (MissionArtifacts)

Return type:

None

audax_core.artifacts.wrap_text_lines(text, *, width=88)[source]

Wrap plain text into simple PDF-friendly line chunks.

Parameters:

  • text (str)

  • width (int)

Return type:

list[str]

audax_core.artifacts.pdf_escape(text)[source]

Escape a text fragment for placement in a minimal PDF content stream.

Parameters:

text (str)

Return type:

str

audax_core.artifacts.write_simple_pdf(path, *, title, text)[source]

Render a compact single-font PDF without external dependencies.

Parameters:

  • path (Path)

  • title (str)

  • text (str)

Return type:

None

Discovery of repository policy files used to ground the mission loop.

audax_core.repo_rules.discover_rule_files(repo_root, workspace_dir)[source]

Find rule and policy files while excluding the generated workspace.

Parameters:

  • repo_root (Path)

  • workspace_dir (Path)

Return type:

list[Path]

audax_core.repo_rules.build_repo_context(repo_root, workspace_dir)[source]

Assemble a bounded text snapshot of repository policy files.

Parameters:

  • repo_root (Path)

  • workspace_dir (Path)

Return type:

str

Prompt builders for spec drafting, implementation, and review rounds.

audax_core.prompts.build_mission_spec_prompt(*, task, repo_context, current_spec, pending_feedback)[source]

Construct the Claude prompt used to draft or revise mission_spec.md.

Parameters:

  • task (str)

  • repo_context (str)

  • current_spec (str)

  • pending_feedback (str)

Return type:

str

audax_core.prompts.build_mission_review_prompt(*, task, repo_context, mission_spec)[source]

Construct the Codex review prompt for a drafted mission spec.

Parameters:

  • task (str)

  • repo_context (str)

  • mission_spec (str)

Return type:

str

audax_core.prompts.build_implementation_prompt(*, task, repo_context, mission_spec, mission_pdf_path, locked_spec, review_feedback)[source]

Construct the Claude prompt for an implementation round.

Parameters:

  • task (str)

  • repo_context (str)

  • mission_spec (str)

  • mission_pdf_path (Path)

  • locked_spec (LockedMissionSpec)

  • review_feedback (str)

Return type:

str

audax_core.prompts.build_implementation_review_prompt(*, task, repo_context, mission_spec, mission_pdf_path, claude_summary, locked_spec)[source]

Construct the Codex review prompt for the current repository state.

Parameters:

  • task (str)

  • repo_context (str)

  • mission_spec (str)

  • mission_pdf_path (Path)

  • claude_summary (str)

  • locked_spec (LockedMissionSpec)

Return type:

str

Schemas and parsing helpers for Codex review payloads.

audax_core.reviews.mission_review_schema()[source]

Return the JSON schema for mission-spec review responses.

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

audax_core.reviews.implementation_review_schema()[source]

Return the JSON schema for implementation review responses.

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

audax_core.reviews.issue_schema(*, include_category)[source]

Return the JSON schema fragment used for structured review issues.

Parameters:

include_category (bool)

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

audax_core.reviews.parse_mission_review(payload)[source]

Convert a raw mission review payload into a typed model.

Parameters:

payload (dict[str, Any])

Return type:

MissionReview

audax_core.reviews.parse_implementation_review(payload)[source]

Convert a raw implementation review payload into a typed model.

Parameters:

payload (dict[str, Any])

Return type:

ImplementationReview

audax_core.reviews.parse_issues(payload, *, default_category)[source]

Parse a best-effort list of review issues from arbitrary JSON.

Parameters:

  • payload (Any)

  • default_category (str)

Return type:

list[ReviewIssue]

audax_core.reviews.mission_review_to_dict(review)[source]

Serialize a mission review model into a JSON-friendly dictionary.

Parameters:

review (MissionReview)

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

audax_core.reviews.implementation_review_to_dict(review)[source]

Serialize an implementation review model into a JSON-friendly dictionary.

Parameters:

review (ImplementationReview)

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

audax_core.reviews.render_review_feedback(issues, *, summary)[source]

Render review issues into the plain-text feedback loop fed back to Claude.

Parameters:

  • issues (list[ReviewIssue])

  • summary (str)

Return type:

str

Data Models And Approval#

Shared data models, defaults, and backend protocols for Audax.

class audax_core.models.LoopConfig(repo_root, workspace_dir, max_spec_rounds=10, max_implementation_rounds=50, require_mission_approval=False, heartbeat_seconds=5.0, subprocess_timeout_seconds=1800.0, claude_cmd='claude', codex_cmd='codex')[source]

Runtime configuration for a single Audax mission run.

Parameters:

  • repo_root (Path)

  • workspace_dir (Path)

  • max_spec_rounds (int)

  • max_implementation_rounds (int)

  • require_mission_approval (bool)

  • heartbeat_seconds (float)

  • subprocess_timeout_seconds (float | None)

  • claude_cmd (str)

  • codex_cmd (str)

class audax_core.models.MissionArtifacts(workspace_dir, mission_spec_md, mission_spec_pdf, mission_spec_lock, logs_dir, reviews_dir, report_path)[source]

Paths for all generated artifacts produced during a mission run.

Parameters:

  • workspace_dir (Path)

  • mission_spec_md (Path)

  • mission_spec_pdf (Path)

  • mission_spec_lock (Path)

  • logs_dir (Path)

  • reviews_dir (Path)

  • report_path (Path)

classmethod from_workspace(workspace_dir)[source]

Construct the canonical artifact layout under a workspace directory.

Parameters:

workspace_dir (Path)

Return type:

MissionArtifacts

ensure_directories()[source]

Create the workspace, logs, and reviews directories if needed.

Return type:

None

log_path(stem, round_num, suffix)[source]

Return the path for a Claude-produced per-round log artifact.

Parameters:

  • stem (str)

  • round_num (int)

  • suffix (str)

Return type:

Path

review_path(stem, round_num)[source]

Return the path for a Codex-produced per-round review artifact.

Parameters:

  • stem (str)

  • round_num (int)

Return type:

Path

class audax_core.models.ReviewIssue(severity, title, details, category='issue', suggested_fix='')[source]

A structured issue reported by a review round.

Parameters:

  • severity (str)

  • title (str)

  • details (str)

  • category (str)

  • suggested_fix (str)

class audax_core.models.MissionReview(approved, summary, issues)[source]

Structured result for reviewing a drafted mission spec.

Parameters:

  • approved (bool)

  • summary (str)

  • issues (list[ReviewIssue])

class audax_core.models.ImplementationReview(mission_accomplished, has_issues, summary, issues)[source]

Structured result for reviewing the repository after implementation.

Parameters:

  • mission_accomplished (bool)

  • has_issues (bool)

  • summary (str)

  • issues (list[ReviewIssue])

class audax_core.models.ApprovalDecision(approved, feedback='', aborted=False)[source]

User approval outcome for a mission spec.

Parameters:

  • approved (bool)

  • feedback (str)

  • aborted (bool)

class audax_core.models.LockedMissionSpec(markdown_text, markdown_sha256, pdf_sha256)[source]

Immutable mission-spec content and its artifact digests.

Parameters:

  • markdown_text (str)

  • markdown_sha256 (str)

  • pdf_sha256 (str)

class audax_core.models.RunSummary(success, mission_spec_rounds, implementation_rounds, final_summary, mission_spec_md, mission_spec_pdf, report_path, error='')[source]

Persisted summary for a completed or failed mission run.

Parameters:

  • success (bool)

  • mission_spec_rounds (int)

  • implementation_rounds (int)

  • final_summary (str)

  • mission_spec_md (str)

  • mission_spec_pdf (str)

  • report_path (str)

  • error (str)

class audax_core.models.ClaudeBackend(*args, **kwargs)[source]

Protocol implemented by Claude backends used by the orchestrator.

class audax_core.models.CodexBackend(*args, **kwargs)[source]

Protocol implemented by Codex backends used by the orchestrator.

Interactive mission approval helpers.

audax_core.approval.interactive_mission_approval(mission_spec, mission_spec_path)[source]

Collect a terminal approval decision for a drafted mission spec.

Parameters:

  • mission_spec (str)

  • mission_spec_path (Path)

Return type:

ApprovalDecision
